name: Sky Relay NeoForge Edition
changelog: Sky Relay NeoForge Edition alpha pack assembled from compiled ECHO modules.
Includes Sky Relay protocol content plus Terminal, Lens, HoloMap, PowerGrid, WeatherCore, Recovery, LogisticsNetwork, NetCore, AdapterCore, RuntimeGuard, and Core modules.
This draft remains gated on launcher install/update/repair/rollback and gameplay smoke evidence.
